rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Educ. Code §12.254, which governs an advisory committee for adult/workforce education assessments and accountability frameworks.
quote: Sec. 12.254. ADVISORY COMMITTEE. (a) An advisory committee is established to make recommendations to the commissioner regarding:
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and this education advisory committee statute.
